act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Bar to the lodgement of suits in the Court.—No proceeding other than
content:
129. Bar to the lodgement of suits in the Court.—No proceeding other than
the proceeding or judicial proceeding under this Act or any rule made there under shall
lie to any court against an order passed or decision made or action taken (tax
determination, tax imposition, imposition of monetary penalty, imposition of interest, any
audit, enquiry or or investigation or other similar matters for amendment or cancellation
of tax recovery) by the Board or by a Commissioner.
